"Break a stick and there is Christ." What if the "supralunar World" is only one molecule's distance away at all times? All that needs to be changed is our own powers of perception (the change is solely in us). Then He (Christ) is here already, and has been.

It is not part of me (within me); I am part of it. (Corpus Christi.) The shepheard with arms extended to farm dimensions of His flock. I..."
